name: south-china-report
description: 通用数据分析 HTML 报告 Skill 的数据、校验、运行时真值、截图无障碍、离线与发布工具集。
//: Playwright 用于 verify-runtime 与 snapshot Gate；未安装时二者以退出码 3 明确报告未验证。安装依赖：npm ci && npx playwright install chromium。

scripts.test:demo-repro: python3 -B scripts/build-demo.py --check && node scripts/validate-report.mjs demo-report/report.offline.html --strict-offline && node scripts/validate-report.mjs demo-report/report-compact.offline.html --strict-offline && node scripts/verify-numbers.mjs demo-report/report.offline.html demo-report/metrics.json --insights demo-report/insights.json && node scripts/verify-numbers.mjs demo-report/report-compact.offline.html demo-report/metrics.json --insights demo-report/insights.json && node scripts/verify-runtime.mjs demo-report/report.offline.html demo-report/metrics.json && node scripts/verify-runtime.mjs demo-report/report-compact.offline.html demo-report/metrics.json && node scripts/run-evals.mjs demo-report/report.offline.html --eval 4 --metrics demo-report/metrics.json --insights demo-report/insights.json && node scripts/run-evals.mjs demo-report/report-compact.offline.html --eval 5 --metrics demo-report/metrics.json --insights demo-report/insights.json
scripts.test:demos: node scripts/run-evals.mjs demo-report/report.html --eval 4 --metrics demo-report/metrics.json --insights demo-report/insights.json && node scripts/run-evals.mjs demo-report/report-compact.html --eval 5 --metrics demo-report/metrics.json --insights demo-report/insights.json
scripts.test:renderer-core: node tests/renderer-contract-smoke.mjs && node tests/renderer-negative-smoke.mjs && node tests/renderer-e2e-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:renderer: npm run test:renderer-core && npm run test:renderer-generalized
scripts.test: npm run test:data && npm run test:renderer && npm run test:planner && npm run test:renderer-multitemplate && npm run test:build-report && npm run test:chart-semantics && npm run test:render-pressure && npm run test:validators && npm run test:demo-migration && npm run test:demo-repro && npm run test:demos && npm run test:templates && npm run test:templates-a11y && npm run test:demo-snapshots && npm run test:offline && npm run test:presentation && npm run test:snapshot-negative && npm run test:snapshot-a11y && npm run test:snapshot-advanced-a11y && npm run test:snapshot-atomic && npm run test:snapshot-network && npm run test:runtime && npm run test:install
